Documentation for this format

name: ProgramIndicator
title: Program Indicator (DAK)
description: Logical Model for representing Program Indicators from a DAK. Core set of indicators that need to be aggregated for decision-making, performance metrics and subnational and national reporting.

element.definition: Logical Model for representing Program Indicators from a DAK. Core set of indicators that need to be aggregated for decision-making, performance metrics and subnational and national reporting.
Description of the program indicator - either Markdown content or a URI to a Markdown file (absolute or relative to repository root)
Definition of what the indicator measures
Description of how the indicator should be disaggregated
References to Health Intervention IDs providing additional context
